3112620.name: Fisher Guy
3112620.description:
A boy fisherman decided to fish on his home islands, but recently, there are eco-activists and now, he has no peace, and most importantly, he can not eat any dish of fish! Help him to catch fish and not get caught by the activists!

Fisher Guy - A game with a top view, where the player as a fisherman must catch fish and deliver it to the chef's bucket, but only he will be hampered by eco-activists who are against your fishing, they have taken over all the islands!

Game Features:
- Visual style
- Many locations
- High Difficulty
